summaryAm: ደግ ልጃገረድ በጫካ ውስጥ አዲስ ጓደኞችን የምታገኝበት እና ደግነት ቤትን እንደሚሞላ የሚያሳይ ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: ውበት በውጭ ብቻ አይደለም፤ ደግ ልብ ቤትን እና ጓደኝነትን ያበራል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This adaptation removes frightening violence and focuses on kindness and safe friendship.

pages.textAm: ስኖው ዋይት ደግ እና ረጋ ያለች ልጃገረድ ነበረች። አበቦችን ትንከባከብ፣ ወፎችንም በደስታ ትመግብ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Snow White was kind and gentle, caring for flowers and birds.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Snow White caring for flowers and feeding birds in a bright palace garden.

pages.textAm: አንድ ቀን ለራሷ ጸጥ ያለ ቦታ ለማግኘት ወደ ጫካ ተጓዘች። ጫካው በአረንጓዴ ቅጠሎች ተሞልቶ ነበር።
pages.textEn: One day she walked into the forest to find a quiet place.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Snow White walking calmly through a friendly green forest with soft light.

pages.textAm: በጫካው ውስጥ ትንሽ ንጹህ ቤት አገኘች። በሩን በቀስታ አንኳኳች እና “ሰላም?” አለች።
pages.textEn: In the forest she found a small clean house and knocked gently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Snow White gently knocking at a tiny cottage door in the woods.

pages.textAm: በቤቱ ውስጥ ሰባት ትንንሽ ጓደኞች ይኖሩ ነበር። ስኖው ዋይትን በደግነት ተቀበሏት፣ እሷም ቤቱን ለማበጀት ረዳች።
pages.textEn: Seven small friends lived there and welcomed her kindly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Seven small friendly forest cottage dwellers welcoming Snow White warmly.

pages.textAm: ሁሉም አብረው ምግብ አዘጋጁ፣ ዘፈኑ፣ ቤቱንም በሳቅ ሞሉት። ስኖው ዋይት ብቻዋን እንዳልሆነች ተሰማት።
pages.textEn: Together they cooked, sang, and filled the house with laughter.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Snow White and seven small friends cooking and singing in a cozy cottage kitchen.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን ጀምሮ ስኖው ዋይት ከጓደኞቿ ጋር በደስታ ኖረች። ደግነቷም በጫካው ሁሉ ብርሃን ሆነ።
pages.textEn: From then on Snow White lived happily with friends, and her kindness shone.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Snow White and her seven friends outside the cottage in warm sunset light.
